follow_ups.title: Promote winning ASR model profile
follow_ups.reason: If the full benchmark identifies a model that beats the current Qwen3-ASR 0.6B MLX baseline on quality and product-runtime constraints, model profile management and service startup should be updated in a separate implementation feature.

follow_ups.title: Numeric formatting strategy
follow_ups.reason: If every candidate model still fails Arabic-number preference on the numeric suite, numeric formatting should be handled as a separate prompt, normalization, or hybrid strategy rather than hidden inside model selection.
